results.title: Jordan slams Iranian attacks on Kuwait, UAE, Bahrain, Qatar, Oman
results.description: AMMAN : Jordan on Sunday condemned Iran's blatant attacks against Kuwait, the United Arab Emirates, Bahrain, Qatar and Oman, calling them a flagrant violation of their sovereignty...

results.title: Catap-Lacson: Before school can teach, parents must lead
results.description: Recent incidents of violence involving learners have once again sparked conversations about school safety, discipline, student well-being

results.title: No Thromde election in Gelephu, says ECB
results.description: While residents of Thimphu and Phuentsholing prepare to vote for their Thrompon and thromde representatives this week, people in Gelephu will not go to the polls. The Election Commission of Bhutan (ECB) says the Gelephu Mindfulness City Authority (GMCA) has taken over responsibilities previously carried out by the thromde administration. For years, Gelephu residents relied [...] The post No Thromde election in Gelephu, says ECB appeared first on BBSCL .

results.title: Govt Calls All-Party Meeting On July 19 Ahead Of Monsoon Session; Opposition Set To Raise Key Issues
results.description: The Centre is expected to present its legislative agenda at the meeting, while opposition parties are likely to flag issues including the NEET-UG paper leak, Operation Sindoor and recent political developments.

results.title: Ayodhya Ram temple trust to define CEO’s powers: Nripendra Mishra
results.description: Ram Temple Construction Committee Chairman Nripendra Mishra said the Ayodhya temple trust will decide the powers and responsibilities of its first CEO. He said the CEO will oversee financial management and devotee services while functioning without government interference under the trust's supervision
